title: Proclamation No. 901, s. 1992
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 901

FURTHER AMENDING PROCLAMATION NO. 435, DATED JANUARY 23, 1932, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE LOO SETTLEMENT FARM, NOW THE BUGUIAS-LOO AGRICULTURAL INDUSTRIAL SCHOOL RESERVATION (BLAIS), LOCATED IN BUGUIAS, BENGUET, BY EXCLUDING THEREFROM A PORTION OF THE LAND EMBRACED THEREIN AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN FOR DISPOSITION UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF THE PUBLIC LAND ACT, AS AMENDED

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, CORAZON C. AQUINO, President of the Philippines, do hereby further amend Proclamation No. 435, dated January 23, 1932, which established the Loo Settlement Farm Reservation, now the Buguias-Loo Agricultural Industrial School Reservation (BLAIS), located in Buguias, Benguet, by excluding therefrom a portion of the land embraced therein, subject to private rights, if any there be, and declaring the same open for disposition under the provisions of the Public Land Act, as amended, which parcel of land is more particularly described, to wit:

“A parcel of land (Lot 3-C, Swo-12484, Amd) being a portion of Lot No. 3, Swo-12484, situated in Barangay Loo, Municipality of Buguias, Province of Benguet, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the W. along lines 1-2-3-4 by Alacan Creek; on the N., along line 4-5 by property of Toling (one name) Fp-41375; on the E., along lines 5-6-7 by Public Land; on the SE., along line 7-8 by property of Ulocan Dionisia, Fp-2157; on the SW., along lines 8-9-1 by Lot No. 3-B (BLAIS) of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan Swo-12484 Amd., being N. 6º 20′ E., 2,152.10 meters from BLLM N. 1, Barangay Loo, Buguias, Benguet. Thence. . . .

of beginning, containing an area of ONE HUNDRED EIGHT THOUSAND NINETY THREE (108,093) SQUARE METERS, more or less.

The distribution of the abovecited parcel of land in favor of the qualified beneficiaries will be undertaken by the Lands Management Service, Cordillera Administrative Region of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 8th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and ninety two.

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

By the President: (Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
